info.title: ScreensPizza API
info.description:
Comprehensive API specification for station management and LiveKit administration.

Store scoping model:
- `storeId` is the external store number (`stores.store_number`, string).
- API resolves `storeId` to internal numeric `stores.id` before querying stations/rooms.
- Store-scoped endpoints return 404 when target resources do not belong to the provided store.

get.description: Returns all stations, or only stations for the provided `storeId`.

parameters.name: storeId
parameters.description: Store number used to scope deletion

parameters.name: storeId
parameters.description: Store number that must own the room

delete.description: Marks token as revoked in your app DB. Does not centrally invalidate already-issued LiveKit JWTs.

post.summary: Issue supervisor tokens for all store rooms

post.description: Allows custom grant composition. If both `storeId` and `video.room` are provided, room must belong to that store.

get.summary: List active LiveKit rooms for a store

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: Optional room-name filter. Can be repeated: ?names=r1&names=r2

post.summary: Send data packet to room participants

data.description: Payload string passed to LiveKit server API
